profileMeta.validation_status: PENDING - awaiting real export files from site. Herbert reported no OE plugin available 2026-03-20. Profile based on standard SkanIt export format; may need adjustment after real file validation.

locale_support.description: Madagascar site uses French locale. CSV exports may use semicolons as delimiter and commas as decimal separator.

plate_grid.description: 8x12 plate grid after metadata header (standard SkanIt export)

well_per_row.description: One row per well with Well, Sample ID, Absorbance
